growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Defined artificial seawater (ESAW, modified) with P. tricornutum exudates + 13C/15N-labeled algal DOM

up.method: nanoSIMS single-cell 13C net incorporation scaled by cell size and abundance
nanoSIMS single-cell 15N net incorporation scaled by cell size and abundance

growth_records.cite: Mayali et al. Single-cell isotope tracing reveals functional guilds of bacteria associated with the diatom Phaeodactylum tricornutum. Nature Communications (2023). DOI:10.1038/s41467-023-41179-9. [PMC10499878]
growth_records.snippet: Devosia PTEAB7WZ ... Nnet CD 16%, Cnet CD 31%, µg C from DOC 2.7, µg N from DON 1.2 (Table 1)
growth_records.notes: Table 1 volumetric net uptake: DOC 2.7 µg C L-1 d-1, DON 1.2 µg N L-1 d-1 over 24 h. Abundance 1.02E6 cells/mL. Cnet CD 31%, Nnet CD 16%. Increased algal biomass. No µ.
